targets.query:
from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ue_usage" and r._field == "dl_bytes")
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: ["slice_type"])
  |> count()
  |> yield(name: "slice_dist")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ue_usage" and r._field == "latency_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean)
  |> group(columns: ["slice_type"])
  |> yield(name: "latency_by_slice")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ue_usage" and r._field == "dl_bytes")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: sum)
  |> group(columns: ["slice_type"])
  |> yield(name: "dl")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ue_usage" and r._field == "ul_bytes")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: sum)
  |> group(columns: ["slice_type"])
  |> yield(name: "ul")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ue_mobility" and r._field == "ho_duration_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: count)
  |> yield(name: "ho_count")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ue_mobility" and r._field == "ho_duration_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean)
  |> yield(name: "ho_duration")

from(bucket: "telecom_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ue_usage" and r._field == "jitter_ms")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean)
  |> group(columns: ["slice_type"])
  |> yield(name: "jitter")
